violations.description: Ensure every ARIA button, link and menuitem has an accessible name
violations.help: ARIA commands must have an accessible name

violations.description: Ensure elements with an ARIA role that require child roles contain them
violations.help: Certain ARIA roles must contain particular children

violations.description: Ensure elements with an ARIA role that require parent roles are contained by them
violations.help: Certain ARIA roles must be contained by particular parents

violations.description: Ensure the order of headings is semantically correct
violations.help: Heading levels should only increase by one

violations.description: Ensure the complementary landmark or aside is at top level
violations.help: Aside should not be contained in another landmark

violations.description: Ensure the document has a main landmark
violations.help: Document should have one main landmark

violations.description: Ensure that lists are structured correctly
violations.help: <ul> and <ol> must only directly contain <li>, <script> or <template> elements

violations.description: Ensure all page content is contained by landmarks
violations.help: All page content should be contained by landmarks

violations.description: Ensure <svg> elements with an img, graphics-document or graphics-symbol role have an accessible text
violations.help: <svg> elements with an img role must have an alternative text
